message:
Fix CI by installing dev dependencies

The generate:excalidraw script requires @peculiar/webcrypto which is in
devDependencies. Remove the --prod flag from pnpm install so dev
dependencies are available during build.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: "pnpm"
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
